item.title:
See you all soon! We've got some fun announcements ahead.
I'll also be doing a workshop on "ho...
item.description:
See you all soon! We've got some fun announcements ahead.
I'll also be doing a workshop on "how we Claude Code" with some workflows I'm excited to share.
Don't worry if you're not there, everything will be recorded and uploaded.
--- @trq212 | ❤️ 94 | 🔁 8 | 💬 16 | 👁 3831
